head_message: feat(data): update arb training corpus, Kalshi tick data, and promote arb-edge model

critical: Groq API blocked (org restricted) — no LLM intelligence since iter 446
Git push broken — no TTY for HTTPS credential prompt
Playwright E2E regression 99% → 35.5% (iter 611-614 risk gate changes)

ideas_this_cycle: Expose risk gate rejection reasons in API (deterministic fallback)
summary: 618 iterations completed across 17.4 hours. Loop now running in degraded deterministic mode due to Groq API outage. Playwright E2E tests regressed from 99% to 35.5% due to risk gate API changes. Git push broken. Core trading pipeline functional with Sharpe 3.211.
